Metadata.title: ServiExpress JC · Cross-Border Freight Between Mexico & the U.S.
Metadata.description: Cross-border trucking between Mexico and the U.S. with our own fleet and 24/7 GPS tracking since 2005. Based in Monterrey, crossing at Laredo. Get a quote.

Hero.subtitle: Specialized freight transport between Mexico and the United States. Every truck tracked by GPS around the clock, from our control room to your end customer.

Services.title: What we haul, proven on the road
Services.subtitle: Domestic and cross-border freight, with our own trucks and certified drivers end to end.

national.imageAlt: ServiExpress JC truck hauling hay bales on double flatbeds
national.title: Domestic freight
national.description: Local, regional, and long-haul service across Mexico. Steel, loose, dry, and oversized freight, GPS-tracked from origin to destination.

international.imageAlt: ServiExpress JC tractor at a certified scale in the United States
international.title: Cross-border freight
international.description: Door-to-door cross-border service. Crossing at Laredo, TX with B1-certified drivers and dual-plated trucks.

specialized.imageAlt: ServiExpress JC truck hauling rebar and steel profiles
specialized.title: One fleet, many kinds of freight
specialized.description: Steel is our specialty: rebar, profiles, and coils. We also move loose freight and 53-foot dry vans, on flatbeds or oversized equipment, always secured and tracked.

Certifications.title: Certifications & Guarantees
Certifications.subtitle: We meet every quality and safety standard in the industry

items.title: B1 Certification
items.description: Drivers certified with a federal B1 license for freight transport

items.title: Dual Plates
items.description: Trucks with dual Mexico–U.S. plates for a hassle-free border crossing

items.title: Full Cargo Insurance
items.description: Comprehensive cargo insurance coverage to protect your goods

items.title: Certified Fleet
items.description: Trucks with current inspections and ongoing preventive maintenance

Talleres.description: Five company-owned yards, with surveillance and controlled access, safeguard your freight and our trucks. And since we don't outsource maintenance either, every tractor is serviced in-house by trained people: your goods travel and wait in reliable hands.
Talleres.imageAlt: ServiExpress JC classic Kenworth in show condition outside our own facilities

About.title: Real people behind every delivery
About.subtitle: We have moved domestic and cross-border freight since 2005: {years} years of a company-owned fleet, driven and maintained by our own people.
About.fleetAlt: ServiExpress JC tractor fleet at our terminal
About.story1: We coordinate and monitor every shipment with our own team, from pickup to final destination, so your freight arrives safe and on time, with no middlemen.
About.story2: To be one of the most competitive carriers in Mexico and the United States, growing year after year without losing the direct relationships that got us here.

Coverage.title: We go everywhere
Coverage.subtitle: All 32 states of Mexico and the entire continental U.S. If your freight needs to move, we haul it, door to door.
Coverage.mapAria: Coverage map of ServiExpress JC across Mexico and the United States, with routes fanning out from Monterrey to both countries
Coverage.reachNote: Door-to-door service in both countries. Don't see your destination? We cover it too.

SocialProof.title: Companies that already trust us with their freight
SocialProof.subtitle: Steel producers, distributors, and exporters moving steel, loose, and dry freight with us.
SocialProof.more: And many more companies across Mexico and the United States

items.quote: We trust SERVIEXPRESS JC with our northern routes, and now with our exports as well. Always on time, with excellent tracking.
Their GPS monitoring gives us total peace of mind. We know exactly where our freight is at all times.
Professionalism and personalized attention. They have been key to the growth of our business.

Quote.summaryNote: With these details an agent prepares your quote and sends it to you on WhatsApp.
Quote.empty: Complete your lane to build your request summary.

quote.title: Request your quote in one minute
quote.description: Pick a lane, equipment, and weight: we build your shipment summary and an agent quotes it on WhatsApp.

apply.title: Join our team
apply.description: We're hiring certified drivers and committed team members.
apply.name: Full name
apply.cvNote: You can attach your résumé directly in the WhatsApp chat.

whatsapp.title: Need help right away?
whatsapp.description: Message us on WhatsApp and we'll get back to you in minutes.
whatsapp.prefill: Hi, I'm coming from the ServiExpress JC website and have a question.

Footer.tagline: Efficiency on wheels, commitment beyond borders
